description: Update TRE topic list in OS. Remove irrelevant topics (e.g. sequence in technology). Refine based on meeting feedback.
Review & comment on 1st TRE article draft. Provide internal feedback. Edit directly in doc. Flag key issues in comments. Complete by end of week.
Begin drafting new AI-related article. Focus on topics like AI in biomedical R&D or disease surveillance. Use Terra Bio site for reference.
Update content item statuses in tracking system. Move items through pipeline (considering, backlog, etc.). Clarify upcoming writing priorities.
